claim_extraction.public_claim: Constitutional Substrate gives speed a boundary.
AL is the replay discipline reference.
Machine productivity becomes legitimate only when every accelerated step leaves a receipt.

reasoning: The tweet states high-level architectural intent. It does not claim completed badges, verified sessions, live backend, live Base anchor, or portal mutation. It correctly frames receipts as the basis of legitimacy.
critical_observation: The tweet promotes a discipline. Candidate files build infrastructure for that discipline. This preserves healthy separation between vision and implementation.
next_action: Continue building candidate proofs. This report does not promote any candidate to live.
canon_line: The tweet is the vision. The receipts are the work. Both are needed. Neither alone is sufficient.
